name: TradePilot Automation Server
description: TradePilot automated options trading execution engine for SPY and QQQ 0DTE

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for JWT tokens — click Generate to create one

TASTY_CLIENT_ID.description: Your TastyTrade OAuth Client ID — get this from app.tradepilotlabs.com/settings

TASTY_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Your TastyTrade OAuth Client Secret — get this from app.tradepilotlabs.com/settings

ATS_URL.description: This app's URL — set to https://YOUR-APP-NAME.herokuapp.com

TRADEPILOT_API_KEY.description: Your TradePilot API key — get this from app.tradepilotlabs.com/settings
